# CI Tripwire

> Source-linked CI/CD workflow security articles for developers and maintainers.

## Navigation

- [Home](https://dsotn.com/)

- [gha-guard](https://github.com/agentlaunchops-ai/gha-guard)

## Articles by Category

### GitHub Actions (6)

- [GitHub Actions Timeouts: Safer CI/CD Runtime Limits](https://dsotn.com/articles/github-actions-timeout-minutes/)
- [workflow_dispatch Inputs: Safer Manual GitHub Actions](https://dsotn.com/articles/workflow-dispatch-input-safety/)
- [Pin GitHub Actions to SHAs: Secure CI/CD Pipelines](https://dsotn.com/articles/pin-github-actions-sha/)
- [GITHUB_TOKEN Permissions: Safer GitHub Actions CI/CD](https://dsotn.com/articles/github-token-permissions/)
- [GitHub pull_request_target Security: Safe PR Workflows](https://dsotn.com/articles/pull-request-target-security/)
- [GitHub Actions Security: 5 CI Risks to Fix Right Now](https://dsotn.com/articles/github-actions-security-risks/)
